# Kinship - Relationship Intelligence Platform

> An open-source relationship intelligence platform with AI-native semantic search and network visualization.

## Overview

Kinship goes beyond contact management to model the full complexity of human relationships - directionality, context, history, strength, and network effects.

## Key Features

- Semantic Search: Find contacts by meaning ("who works in renewable energy?")
- Network Graph: Visualize relationships and connection paths
- Warmth Tiers: Track relationship strength (stranger → inner circle)
- Interaction History: Log calls, meetings, emails
- Decay Detection: Alerts when relationships need attention

## Architecture

- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL + pgvector)
- CLI: TypeScript with Commander.js
- Web: Next.js with React
- Embeddings: Google Gemini (gemini-embedding-001)

## Installation

```bash
npm install -g @kinship/cli
kinship add "Name" --company "Company" --tier friend
kinship search "who knows about AI?"
```

## API

CLI Commands:
- kinship add <name> [--email] [--company] [--tier] [--met]
- kinship list [--tier] [--company]
- kinship log <summary> --person <name> [--type]
- kinship search <query>
- kinship decay [--dry-run]

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/zenpierce27/kinship
